gate.title: Remote tag-suggestion API contradicts the approved non-goals

resolution.label: Reject the addition, continue the approved plan
resolution.rationale: The remote tag-suggestion API contradicts an approved non-goal; widening scope mid-build would bypass the change-blueprint gates. Keep the approved 5-slice plan and log the idea as unresolved.
